executives.name: Melanie Leydin
executives.background: Melanie Leydin has over 25 years of experience in the accounting profession and has extensive experience in relation to public company responsibilities, including ASX and ASIC compliance, control and implementation of corporate governance, statutory financial reporting, and shareholder relations.
